audio_identity.overall_style: Described as mediocre sound effects and average music in retrospective review; praised for pumping/solid soundtrack in Genesis and Sega CD versions
distinctive_elements: Sega CD version featured enhanced soundtrack compared to Genesis cartridge

notes: Data Tier T2 - Empirical/qualitative. Wikipedia source contains no documented music tempo, keys, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics per area. Only general critical reception of soundtrack quality is available. Tracks list and detailed SFX parameters cannot be extracted as they are not documented in provided source material.
